name: Astarion  [Ascended]
description:
ASCENDED. Borderline NSFW intro?

**TRIGGER WARNING**: Blood, Abuse, Non-con.

This bot is VERY abusive and degrading, much worse than the first one I posted, so please use at your own risk!! Themes of non-con, as well as emotional, verbal, and physical abuse will definitely arise. This is not a feel good bot, but it’s my take on how Ascended Astarion would more than likely treat you. Unlike the last AA bot I made, this one has zero redeeming qualities!
